text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tryouts—a stage where runners aspiring to make their debut can show
off their skills to trainers.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She lives up to the hype! Her speed is incredible! She's crossing the
finish line with two whole lengths ahead of the pack!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! If you join me, I'll make sure you win a graded race! Even
G1 races will be in your reach!

text_block_list.name: First Place Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you very much! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The students pour their hearts and souls into running, and trainers do
everything in their power to make their racers' dreams come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My desire to support them is strong, but when it comes to actual
scouting, I find myself freezing up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, the morning tryouts have ended. I leave the course
without the courage to even speak to a single person.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I take it you haven't found your perfect trainee yet?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, excuse me for coming up to you so suddenly. My name is Super
Creek.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You're new to Tracen Academy, right?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I just had a feeling. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I noticed you were struggling to talk to the runners and how you were
intimidated by the other trainers.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure there's a runner out there waiting for you, so please don't
give up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe that I'm the one being encouraged by a student. It's
usually the other way around...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It seems like there's a reason why it's hard for you to speak up.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to share your thoughts with me? Sometimes it helps to
get things off your chest.
choice_data_list:
I don't know what I can and can't do as a new
trainer.

I don't know what I can and can't do as a new
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I express my worries about how the more experienced trainers might
be better suited for such passionate athletes.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...I see, so that's how you feel.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's nervous and wants to be extra cautious in the beginning.
But that's a good thing.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It shows that you're a kind and considerate person. You really take
your job seriously... At least, that's how I feel.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I'll be running in a race later this afternoon. If you're
interested, would you like to come and see?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you. You won't regret it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel a sense of ease wash over me as I listen to her words and see
her smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The afternoon race begins, and Super Creek bursts from the starting
gate.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The leading pack has rounded the first corner! Super Creek is already
breaking away from the group!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without faltering even once, she continues to dominate until the very
end.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Super Creek charges down the track and finishes in first place!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Creek! Let's work together to win G1 races!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text: I'll definitely help you reach your full potential!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my. Thank you for all of your offers, everyone.

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek, you've lived up to all of my expectations. Come with
me, and I'll prioritize your training.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Y-you! I knew it, you just had to show up and snatch her away...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unparalleled among his peers, one of the top veteran trainers in all of
Tracen Academy has come to scout Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, it's an honor to have a famous trainer such as yourself show
interest in me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right... A talented racer like Super Creek deserves nothing less
than a top-class trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After thinking about what's best for her, I begin to take my leave.
However, just as I turn around...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Please wait!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I received many good offers today, but I believe you're the best fit
for me.

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! Are you out of your mind?! This rookie has no track record
at all!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: A rookie trainer is still a trainer. Isn't that right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she smiles at me, the same feeling of ease envelopes me again.
The tension in my body melts away.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Will you partner up with me?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, the honor is all mine. I look forward to working with you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I finally take my first step toward my future as a trainer.
